description: Canonical ticker symbol as defined in institution-asset-mapping (e.g. VOO)
Broad asset class (equities | fixed_income | precious_metals | real_estate | cash | other)
Type of security (individual_equity | etf | mutual_fund | money_market | stable_value | other)
Market segment within asset class (large_cap | mid_cap | small_cap | total_market | inflation_protected | international_bond | gold | blank if not applicable)
Geographic exposure (us | ex_us | emerging | global | blank if not applicable)
